column2: Toggle Void Everything mode. When active, dismantling operations will obliterate all tiles, walls, liquids, wires, and actuators instead of normal dismantling.
Void Everything requires Carefree Mode to be enabled in server config.
If enabled, building/replacement wands will stop consuming items when you hold enough in your inventory (see per-type thresholds below). Set a threshold to 0 for always-infinite.
When Carefree Mode is on, controls whether item drops are suppressed during wand operations.
When Carefree Mode is on, controls whether Demon/Crimson Altars can be destroyed.
When Carefree Mode is on, controls whether delicate tiles (e.g. Shadow Orbs, Demon Hearts) can be destroyed.
When enabled, holding Shift while hovering a wand shows its lore text.\nDisable to hide lore entirely.
When enabled, wands play custom sound effects on action success.\nDisable for silent operations.
When You Run Out of Blocks
Bright glowing core only — crisp, low-density (default).
Auto-switch to the next matching block in inventory and continue (default).
Pre-check stock and refuse to start unless every tile can be placed.
Stop at the first missing block, leaving placed tiles in place.

The Gods of Space let you enact your thoughts into reality.
The Deity of Creation lets you manifest order and existence at will.
The Deity of Erasure lets you restore nothingness as you wish.
The Deity of Transmutation lets you reweave the threads of what already is.
An advanced mechanism wrench, refined beyond the Grand Design. Where gods shape matter, engineers shape purpose.
The Deity of Timelessness lets you separate space from the powers of creation.
The Deity of Chromas lets you dress the world in colours of your choosing.
The Deity of Tides lets you command the flowing matter.
The Torch God lets you spread light across the world with ease. Or awaken their wrath if you dare.
The Architect of Boundaries lets you define the canvas of creation.
The Sculptor of Forms lets you mold the blueprints of creation.

column2: WSW: The Ice Biome got corrupted? Use the Wand of Replacement to swap them for snow. It's immune!
column4: WSW: ¿El Bioma de Hielo se corrompió? Usa la Varita de Reemplazo para cambiarlos por nieve. ¡Es inmune!
column5: WSW: Le Biome de Glace a été corrompu ? Utilisez la Baguette de Remplacement pour les échanger contre de la neige. C'est immunisé !
